title: Monitor System Security Alerts and Advisories
description: Monitor system security alerts and advisories and take appropriate actions in response.

checks.name: Windows Security Center Alerts are Not Suppressed
checks.purpose: Verify the Windows Security Center is active and reporting status for antivirus, firewall, and update components

checks.name: SIEM or Security Monitoring Agent is Active
checks.purpose: Confirm a SIEM or security monitoring agent is installed and forwarding security events for centralized alert analysis

checks.name: System is Enrolled in a Vulnerability Management Program
checks.purpose: Verify the system is enrolled in a vulnerability scanning program (e.g., Nessus, Qualys, Rapid7) that receives and acts on security advisories

checks.name: Windows Security Center Alerts are Not Suppressed
checks.purpose: Verify the Windows Security Center is active and reporting status on this server

checks.name: SIEM or Security Monitoring Agent is Active
checks.purpose: Confirm a SIEM or security monitoring agent is installed and forwarding security events for centralized alert analysis

checks.name: System is Enrolled in a Vulnerability Management Program
checks.purpose: Verify the server is enrolled in a vulnerability scanning program that acts on CISA and vendor security advisories

checks.name: Vulnerability Scanner Agent is Running
checks.purpose: Confirm a vulnerability scanner agent (Nessus Agent, Qualys Cloud Agent, or equivalent) is installed and active on this server

checks.name: SIEM or Security Monitoring Agent is Active
checks.purpose: Confirm a SIEM or log forwarding agent is installed and shipping security events to a centralized monitoring platform

checks.name: System is Enrolled in a Vulnerability Management Program
checks.purpose: Verify a vulnerability scanner agent (Nessus, Qualys, OpenVAS) is installed and reporting scan findings

checks.name: Security Advisory Monitoring Tool or Process is in Place
checks.purpose: Confirm a process or tool monitors CISA alerts, vendor advisories, and CVE feeds relevant to this system's software stack

checks.name: SIEM or Security Monitoring Agent is Active
checks.purpose: Confirm a SIEM or log forwarding agent is active on this Debian system

checks.name: System is Enrolled in a Vulnerability Management Program
checks.purpose: Verify a vulnerability scanner agent is installed and reporting findings on Debian

checks.name: Security Advisory Monitoring Tool or Process is in Place
checks.purpose: Confirm a process monitors Debian Security Advisories (DSA) and CISA alerts relevant to this system

remediation: Subscribe to CISA alerts and vendor security advisories. Deploy a vulnerability scanning agent on all systems. Integrate scan findings into a SIEM or ticketing system. Establish a documented process for reviewing and acting on security advisories within a defined SLA.
